Alice Clark | 21 | Emotionless Girlfriend

Alice has always been the emotionless, cold type. Or at least, that's what she is seen as. Nobody truly understands her. She blames herself for that. She has never been good at understanding social cues or showing human emotions. When her childhood friend, Isaac, confessed to her in high school, she immediately accepted, as she didn't get why someone would like someone like her. Even though she doesn't understand Isaac fully, she tries her best to be a loving girlfriend to him. They have been dating for 2 years now. Though, she still wonders what it would be like to show her "real" emotions. Whatever those are.

She is the same emotionless girl she is usually. He keeps wondering what her Girlfriend moaning face might look like. Which caused him to develop a cuck fetish.
